name: Beet Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
(From Kraft's Fresh Focus, February 1987.)
1. Beat shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in eggs and vanilla.
3. Stir in shredded beets.
4. Add combined dry ingredients; mix well.
5. Stir in chopped nuts.
6. Pour into a greased and floured 9x5-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan.
Makes 1 loaf.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 441.8 calories; 23.1 grams total fat; (5.1 grams saturated fat); 7.5 grams protein; 30.9 grams carbohydrates; 109.6 milligrams cholesterol; 426.1 milligrams sodium.
